name: Giveaway
short: Button-based giveaways with embed cards, auto draw and reroll.
description: Run giveaways with a one-click entry button (persistent across restarts), an embed card, configurable duration and winner count, automatic drawing and reroll. Bilingual (DE/EN), with web dashboard integration.
author: Domekologe
install_msg:
Thanks for installing Giveaway!

Load it with `[p]load giveaway`, then configure it via its commands or the PDC web dashboard (if installed).
end_user_data_statement: This cog temporarily stores the Discord user IDs of participants in active giveaways, plus per-server giveaway configuration. Entries are removed when a giveaway ends.
